errors: compressed-tensors 0.9.3: QuantizationArgs validation error 'group_size must be positive' during model decompression for some quantized layers. The quantization_config specifies group_size=128 but internal parsing produces group_size=0 for certain weight groups.
compressed-tensors 0.15.0.1: AttributeError - QuantizerCompressor API changed from decompress_model/compress_model to compress_model only, making decompression impossible.

Model uses Qwen3_5ForConditionalGeneration (VL model) with 'linear_attn' weight structure incompatible with standard Qwen3_5ForCausalLM architecture. Weights named 'model.language_model.layers.X.linear_attn.*' cannot map to expected 'model.layers.X.self_attn.*' or 'model.layers.X.mlp.*' keys.

Loading without quantization_config results in MISSING weights: mlp.gate_proj.weight, mlp.up_proj.weight, mlp.down_proj.weight, self_attn.q_proj.weight, self_attn.k_proj.weight, self_attn.v_proj.weight, self_attn.o_proj.weight - all randomly initialized because safetensors keys don't match expected model architecture.

vLLM backend: AttributeError - TokenizersBackend has no attribute 'all_special_tokens_extended'. The custom Qwen3.5 tokenizer class 'TokenizersBackend' is not supported by vLLM's tokenizer infrastructure.

HF backend with transformers 5.9.0: cannot pass max_gen_toks=2048 via --model_args (forwarded to from_pretrained as unexpected kwarg). Must use --gen_kwargs but generation kwargs only apply during inference, not model loading.
HF backend with transformers 5.9.0: cannot pass max_model_len via --model_args (forwarded to from_pretrained as unexpected kwarg for Qwen3_5ForCausalLM).
accuracy.root_cause: Model architecture mismatch: model was exported from Qwen3.5-VL base (architectures: [Qwen3_5ForConditionalGeneration], layer_types: linear_attention + full_attention) using compressed-tensors auto_round quantization. This VL model's weight key structure (linear_attn.A_log, linear_attn.conv1d.weight, linear_attn.in_proj_a/b/qkv/z, etc.) is incompatible with standard Qwen3.5ForCausalLM (text-only) architecture. No version of compressed-tensors (0.9.3 or 0.15.0.1) can successfully decompress the quantized weights with the current transformers/vllm stack.
accuracy.weight_mapping_failure: Safetensors contains weights for Qwen2.5-Omni/VL architecture (linear_attn with Mamba-style A_log, dt_bias, conv1d, in_proj_a/b/z/qkv). Standard Qwen3_5ForCausalLM expects self_attn.q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/o_proj weights and mlp.gate/up/down_proj. No mapping exists between linear_attn and self_attn weight keys.
accuracy.suggested_fix: Re-export model with auto_quant using export_format=AWQ or GPTQ (not compressed-tensors/auto_round), or use a compatible base model (text-only Qwen3.5-9B without VL components). The VL model architecture requires different handling than the text-only model the quantization was designed for.
